sections.paragraph:
adjective

big, great, large, huge, goodly; strong, massive, hefty; rich, fat; grand

masculine noun גדול (>>גידול)

growth, increase, increment, spread, buildup, augmentation; rearing, cultivation, nurturing, breeding

masculine noun גדול (>>גידול)

cultivar, crop

masculine noun גדול (>>גידול)

tumor, neoplasm, swelling
